REPORT OF STATUS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Jul-09-2025 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Joan C. Rodman for Maynard Werner, Executor (via Zoom).

The Court called the matter on the petition for approval of status of administration, filed March 28, 2025. The Court noted that a subsequent petition for approval of status of administration was filed on July 3, 2025, and is currently set for hearing on September 3, 2025.

The Court initially proposed taking both petitions off calendar and setting a new status hearing. However, after discussion with counsel, the Court opted to take only the instant petition off calendar and to retain the September 3, 2025 hearing date on the July 3, 2025 petition.

Ms. Rodman reported that the probate accounting remains in draft form due to delays in communication and incomplete supporting documentation provided to the accountant. The Court cautioned that continued delays may affect the executor's entitlement to interest on a pecuniary gift. Ms. Rodman confirmed she had discussed that issue with her client.

The Court directed that, should further delays occur, counsel must file a supplemental status report in advance of the September hearing detailing the reasons.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)

REPORT OF STATUS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar May-27-2025 Continued To Jul-09-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing For Filing Of A Petition For Final Distribution Or A Petition For Approval Of Report On Status Of Administration
Off Calendar Apr-15-2025 Off Calendar

REPORT OF STATUS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Feb-25-2025 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Joan Rodman for Maynard Werner, Executor (via Zoom).

The Court noted that the petition did not comply with local rules and that the requested 60-day extension had already lapsed, rendering the petition moot. Accordingly, the Court took the petition off calendar.

The Court and Ms. Rodman discussed the next steps for closing the estate. Ms. Rodman reported that a draft accounting had recently been received, which was unavailable at the time of the last status report. Based on this progress, she anticipated filing a petition for final distribution within 45 days.

The Court set a further status hearing for April 15, 2025, at 9:00 a.m. in Department 204, for filing of a petition for final distribution. In the event of further delays, Ms. Rodman agreed to file a petition for approval of a report on the status of administration.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Apr-29-2024 Continued To Jul-15-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Joan Rodman appeared by zoom for Maynard Werner (petitioner).

Mrs. Rodman stated that a hard copy of the inventory and appraisal went out to the probate referee today, that they are working on the accounting with a fiduciary and that there are multiple beneficiaries so more than likely the petitioner will not be able to get waivers. If a final account is not done, Mrs. Rodman will file a petition for approval of a report on status of administration. Status on close of estate is continued to July 15, 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Singh. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Apr-08-2024 Continued To Apr-29-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Mar-13-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Joan Rodman appeared by zoom for Maynard Werner.

No one appeared to object. There being no objections, the Court waives the notice issue with respect to the French Consulate, and granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The will dated August 28, 2020 is admitted to probate. Maynard Werner is appointed as the Executor of the estate with full authority. Bond is not required. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for April 8, 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Michael Kasolas is appointed probate referee.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Choi. Not reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Oct-12-2022 Continued To Nov-21-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Joan Rodman, via Zoom, for Maynard Werner, Petitioner.

Counsel reports that Ms. Schubert has been unavailable due to health issues and received an email from her advising that she is amenable to receiving papers electronically. Counsel advises that she intends to clear the Examiner's notes and requests a continuance.

The matter is continued to Nov-21-2022 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Singh. Not Reported.
